name: create_upwork_portfolio_demos_for_dynasty_phase_0
trigger: When facing a task similar to: Create Upwork portfolio demos for Dynasty Phase 0
approach: Created 2 of 3 Upwork portfolio demos (GEO Audit, Workflow Automation) in markdown format for Clayton to copy-paste into Upwork. Used existing Bling Dental audit data to create case study.
success_indicators: Upwork portfolio doesn't need hosted demos — markdown case studies that Clayton can paste into his profile work just as well. Lower friction, faster to iterate.
